examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml:
set -euo pipefail
exec > /tmp/bootstrap.log 2>&1
trap 'echo "[bootstrap-trap] rc=$? at $(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; sleep infinity' EXIT
nohup python3 -m http.server 8001 --directory /tmp >/dev/null 2>&1 &
if [ -n "${KINOFORGE_SELFTERM_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then python3 -c "import os; open('/tmp/selfterm.py','w').write(os.environ['KINOFORGE_SELFTERM_SCRIPT'])" && nohup python3 /tmp/selfterm.py > /tmp/selfterm.log 2>&1 & fi
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/__init__.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/_video_io.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py
echo 'H4sIAAAAAAAC/1WPMW7DMAxFd52C0NIlVfbOMdJONRB3rgmJsgXYlCHRQYGidy/jxEM28hMffM9a+8GRCrEnqFSuVKD6khapEHMBGQlOKcZVb7XhITHBe9e14DNLQS/OmMtzrawMmbfmuf2CJQdADkA/S670ZgDaz0sHx4GYCgod4NzoWgVlrcffFP4eCRZJUT9oyDjTHo+Ek4z6tkE/7sipAuo8xdcbFyplgDmHdSIHnYL4OLxU0/e0GbiwG7l7/9vPoe8VNbEKoGzw9z5Ivhk5Y601/7ahZLcuAQAA' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/__init__.py
export PYTHONPATH=/tmp/kfsrv:${PYTHONPATH:-}
pip install -q --extra-index-url None torch==2.6.0 torchvision==0.21.0 torchaudio==2.6.0 'diffusers>=0.32' 'transformers>=4.45' 'accelerate>=1.0' 'peft>=0.13' 'fastapi>=0.115' 'uvicorn>=0.30' 'imageio[ffmpeg]>=2.34'
export WAN_MODEL_ID=Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B-Diffusers
python -m kinoforge.engines.diffusers.servers.wan_t2v_server
examples/configs/modal-flashvsr-x4.yaml:
set -euo pipefail
exec > /tmp/bootstrap.log 2>&1
trap 'echo "[bootstrap-trap] rc=$? at $(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; sleep infinity' EXIT
nohup python3 -m http.server 8001 --directory /tmp >/dev/null 2>&1 &
if [ -n "${KINOFORGE_SELFTERM_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then python3 -c "import os; open('/tmp/selfterm.py','w').write(os.environ['KINOFORGE_SELFTERM_SCRIPT'])" && nohup python3 /tmp/selfterm.py > /tmp/selfterm.log 2>&1 & fi
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv

touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/__init__.py

touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py

echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/_video_io.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py
echo 'H4sIAAAAAAAC/1WPMW7DMAxFd52C0NIlVfbOMdJONRB3rgmJsgXYlCHRQYGidy/jxEM28hMffM9a+8GRCrEnqFSuVKD6khapEHMBGQlOKcZVb7XhITHBe9e14DNLQS/OmMtzrawMmbfmuf2CJQdADkA/S670ZgDaz0sHx4GYCgod4NzoWgVlrcffFP4eCRZJUT9oyDjTHo+Ek4z6tkE/7sipAuo8xdcbFyplgDmHdSIHnYL4OLxU0/e0GbiwG7l7/9vPoe8VNbEKoGzw9z5Ivhk5Y601/7ahZLcuAQAA' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/__init__.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_engine.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_fetch_weights.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/__init__.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_runtime.py
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_input_prep.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core/errors.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core
touch /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core/__init__.py
mkdir -p /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core
echo '' | python3 -c "import sys,base64,gzip; sys.stdout.buffer.write(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(sys.stdin.read())))" > /tmp/kfsrv/kinoforge/core/scale_target.py
export PYTHONPATH=/tmp/kfsrv:${PYTHONPATH:-}
pip install -q --extra-index-url None torch==2.6.0 torchvision==0.21.0 torchaudio==2.6.0 'fastapi>=0.115' 'uvicorn>=0.30' 'imageio[ffmpeg]>=2.34' modelscope
export KINOFORGE_SKIP_WAN_LOAD=1
# ---- upscaler provision (composed) ----
set -euo pipefail
python -c "import torch; cap = torch.cuda.get_device_capability() if torch.cuda.is_available() else None; assert cap is None or cap[0] >= 8, f'flashvsr: BSA needs SM80+, got {cap}'" || exit 87
curl -L -f -o "/tmp/block_sparse_attn-0.0.1-cp313-cp313-linux_x86_64.whl" "https://github.com/killett/kinoforge-artifacts/releases/download/bsa-cu124-torch2.6-cp313-v1/block_sparse_attn-0.0.1-cp313-cp313-linux_x86_64.whl"
pip install --no-deps /tmp/block_sparse_attn-0.0.1-cp313-cp313-linux_x86_64.whl
pip install --no-deps "git+https://github.com/OpenImagingLab/FlashVSR@b527c6f285fb30df530f5febc8b45764a789c961"
pip install "modelscope" "safetensors==0.5.3" "transformers>=4.48,<5" "accelerate==1.8.1" "peft==0.17.0" "einops==0.8.1" "ftfy==6.3.1" "sentencepiece==0.2.0" "imageio[ffmpeg,pyav]>=2.34" "av"
python -m kinoforge.upscalers.flashvsr._fetch_weights --bundle hf:JunhaoZhuang/FlashVSR-v1.1 --dest /workspace/models/flashvsr --include-long-video 0
curl -L -f -o "/workspace/models/flashvsr/posi_prompt.pth" "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenImagingLab/FlashVSR/b527c6f285fb30df530f5febc8b45764a789c961/examples/WanVSR/prompt_tensor/posi_prompt.pth"
curl -L -f -o "/workspace/models/flashvsr/utils_upstream.py" "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenImagingLab/FlashVSR/b527c6f285fb30df530f5febc8b45764a789c961/examples/WanVSR/utils/utils.py"
export HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1
python -m kinoforge.engines.diffusers.servers.wan_t2v_server
